zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Didbrok於1381年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托時，她的父親Robert de Didbrok32歲，母親Mrs. Robert Didbrok29歲。她於1400年與John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1428年1月9日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Didbrok于1381年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托时，她的父亲Robert de Didbrok32岁，母亲Mrs. Robert Didbrok29岁。她于1400年与John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1428年1月9日在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Didbrok was born in 1381, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Robert de Didbrok, was 32 and her mother, Mrs. Robert Didbrok, was 29. She married John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede in 1400, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 January 1428, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Didbrok est née en 1381, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Didbrok, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Didbrok, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede en 1400, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1428, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Didbrok 1381 in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Didbrok 32 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Robert Didbrok 29. Sie hat 1400 in Gloucestershire, England John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Januar 1428 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Didbrok è nata il nel 1381 nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Robert de Didbrok, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Robert Didbrok, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede nel 1400, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1428, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Didbrokが1381年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで生まれた時，父Robert de Didbrokは32歳，母Mrs. Robert Didbrokは29歳であった。1400年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでJohn Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmedeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1428年1月9日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Didbrok(이)가 1381년 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Didbrok(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Didbrok(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1428년 1월 9일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Didbrok nasceu em 1381, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Didbrok, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Robert Didbrok, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede em 1400, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1428, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Didbrok родилась в 1381 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Didbrok было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Didbrok, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede в 1400 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 января 1428 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Didbrok nació en 1381, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Didbrok, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs. Robert Didbrok, tenía 29 años. Se casó con John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede en 1400, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1428, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
